item.title: 🥳 The announcement of an agreement between the U.S. and Iran instantly changed the market narrative from fear to opportunity. After months of traders worrying about supply shocks, inflation, and broad
item.description: <p>🥳 The announcement of an agreement between the U.S. and Iran instantly changed the market narrative from fear to opportunity. After months of traders worrying about supply shocks, inflation, and broader geopolitical instability, investors suddenly had a reason to price in the opposite scenario: r

item.title: RT by @Teknium: Hermes agents are now natively economic, they can now:- buy things online with @link- pay per request with @mpp- provision external services with @stripe projects
item.description: <p>Hermes agents are now natively economic, they can now:<br /><br />- buy things online with <a href="https://nitter.net/link" title="Link">@link</a><br />- pay per request with <a href="https://nitter.net/mpp" title="Machine Payments Protocol">@mpp</a><br />- provision external services with <a hr

item.title:
What an incredible #WorldCup bettor!
He made $9.24M in a single day, winning all 4 of his bets for a 100% win rate.
In the Iran vs. New Zealand match, he spent $7.03M betting that Iran would not win
item.description:
What an incredible #WorldCup bettor!
He made $9.24M in a single day, winning all 4 of his bets for a 100% win rate.
In the Iran vs. New Zealand match, he spent $7.03M betting that Iran would not win.
He was right — and made $7.34M from that bet alone!
polymarket.com/0x96cfcb0c309…

item.title:
Meet gardenshed: $764K profit in just 4 days from #WorldCup betting.
He has placed 8 bets, winning 7 of them for an 87.5% win rate.
Currently, he's betting $66.2K on the France vs. Senegal match a f
item.description:
Meet gardenshed: $764K profit in just 4 days from #WorldCup betting.
He has placed 8 bets, winning 7 of them for an 87.5% win rate.
Currently, he's betting $66.2K on the France vs. Senegal match a few hours later, predicting France won't win.
If France doesn't win, he'll make another ~$132K.
po

item.title:
James Wynn(@JamesWynnReal) is back again!
This time, he's chasing the rally in gold, opening a 25x long on 10.03 xyz:GOLD($43K), with a liquidation price of $4,267.
This is his first #gold trade on
item.description:
James Wynn(@JamesWynnReal) is back again!
This time, he's chasing the rally in gold, opening a 25x long on 10.03 xyz:GOLD($43K), with a liquidation price of $4,267.
This is his first #gold trade on Hyperliquid.
hypurrscan.io/address/0x5078…

item.title:
The OTC whale made another great swing trade.
5 hours ago, he sold the 29,000 $ETH($53.1M) he bought during last week's dip, making a $6.4M profit!
https://arkm.com/explorer/entity/a922a9df-6a8f-4db
